{{Quote|Kerr is rumored to have settled in the Rannon system, although this comes from an unreliable smuggler.|General Airen Cracken, ''Wanted by Cracken''|<ref name="WbC" />}}
'''Rannon''' was a [[Forest/Legends|forested]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Instrop sector/Legends|Instrop sector]]. It was [[Colonist/Legends|settled]] [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] before the reign of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and was inhabited by a population of ten million [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]], who governed their settlements via cooperative council.

Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Danaan Kerr]] took up residence in Rannon's [[Valley of Ternaax]]. By [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], Kerr had [[Force sense/Legends|sensed]] that the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] had [[Transfer essence|survived]] his [[Death/Legends|death]] at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], which caused Kerr's [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] corruption to manifest, transforming the valley he resided in. Kerr began to terrorize Rannon's populace, with rumors concerning atrocities committed by the Dark Jedi spreading off-world. Eventually, a group of individuals investigated the Valley of Ternaax and encountered Kerr himself.

==Description==
Rannon was a remote terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Rannon system/Legends|Rannon system]],<ref name="WbC" /> a part of the [[Instrop sector/Legends|Instrop sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The planet occupied the third closest [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] to its [[Star/Legends|star]], the [[Color/Legends|yellow-white]] [[Rannon (star)|Rannon]], and had two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of its own. Rannon completed one [[Local year|revolution]] around its sun every 380 [[Local day/Legends|local days]], each of which was twenty [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]] long.<ref name="WbC" />

Rannon had standard [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]], a Type I breathable [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], and a pleasant [[Temperature/Legends|temperate]] climate. Its terrain features included [[Mountain/Legends|mountainous]] [[Forest/Legends|forests]] and a moderate [[Hydrosphere/Legends|hydrosphere]].<ref name="WbC" />

==History==
Rannon was first [[Colonist/Legends|colonized]] several [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] before the reign of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]<ref name="WbC" /> of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the insane [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Danaan Kerr]] also settled on the planet, living in Rannon's [[Valley of Ternaax]] as a [[Hermit/Legends|hermit]]. At some point by<ref name="WbC" /> [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]],<ref name="Date">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']] is dated to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Since ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates that conflict to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the placement of the sourcebook therefore translates to [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].</ref> Kerr began to [[Force sense/Legends|sense]] [[Disturbance in the Force/Legends|stirrings]] in the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] indicating to him that Palpatine,<ref name="WbC" /> who had in fact [[Transfer essence|survived]] in a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] body,<ref name="NEC" /> was still alive. Since that revelation, Kerr's evil and corruption became to manifest, transforming the valley where he resided.<ref name="WbC" />

Kerr began to influence Rannon's populace and terrorize the natives, with rumors concerning atrocities committed by the Dark Jedi beginning to spread across the Instrop and other [[Sector/Legends|sectors]]. In addition, Kerr trained several initiates in the use of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Eventually, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] of the New Republic noted the rumors that Kerr had taken up residence in the Rannon [[Star system/Legends|system]] in ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]'', a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] that served as a compilation of reports on various threats to the New Republic.<ref name="WbC" />

{{RPGseed}}
At some point, a group of individuals visited Rannon. A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] member of the group perceived a disturbance in the Force caused by Kerr, although the individuals learned little by talking to the natives about it. Eventually, a local who was considered to be crazy revealed to the group the existence of Kerr and the Valley of Ternaax. The group subsequently investigated the valley, encountering the Dark Jedi himself.<ref name="WbC" />
{{Endgame}}

==Inhabitants==
Rannon was home to a population of ten million [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]], who maintained a society of [[Realspace/Legends|space]]-level technology. Although the local populace exported [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuffs]] and [[Gemstone/Legends|gems]] off-world, their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] lacked any outstanding resources. To most people, Rannon seemed a simple world, albeit one that could serve as home, and no significant goods were imported from elsewhere.<ref name="WbC" />

Settlements were spread across Rannon's surface, and the native society governed itself via cooperative council consisting of representatives sent from each [[City/Legends|town]]. The council decided on standardized laws that applied to each settlement. During the reign of the New Republic, the Dark Jedi Danaan Kerr also lived on Rannon as a hermit.<ref name="WbC" />

==Locations==
The Valley of Ternaax was a lush and beautiful area of Rannon that was covered with forests. It was located far from the planet's settlements and at first was only known to the Dark Jedi Danaan Kerr. Due to the manifestation of Kerr's dark side corruption, the valley's landscape eventually became rotted, dark, and evil. Rannon also had a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] that offered limited services.<ref name="WbC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rannon was first mentioned in the [[1993]] ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' supplement [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], which was written by [[Louis J. Prosperi]] for [[West End Games]].<ref name="WbC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Rannon system, and therefore the planet itself, in grid square T-17.<ref name="TEA" />
